title: freziera dasycarpa
intro: Freziera dasycarpa is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the mountain pepper tree. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Freziera dasycarpa include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Freziera dasycarpa typically involve infusions of the leaves or bark, which can be consumed as teas or used as a topical application.
